creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: This looks like the same problem as https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2017-August/066855.html and https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2017-October/067254.html triggered by the curl port enabling THREADED_RESOLVER by default.  It's not because of mixing the wrong libraries.
